title: Add Tasks
description: Add TripAdvisor restaurant search URLs as tasks for scraping restaurant listings

content.introduction: Add TripAdvisor restaurant search URLs to your squid for scraping restaurant listings. The scraper extracts restaurant details including ratings, reviews, contact information, price ranges, location coordinates, and Michelin status from TripAdvisor's restaurant directory.

taskFormat.title: Task Format
taskFormat.content: Each task should contain a URL from a TripAdvisor restaurant search results page. Search for restaurants by location on TripAdvisor, then use those search URLs as tasks.

rows.description: TripAdvisor restaurant search results page URL

supportedUrls.title: Supported URL Formats
supportedUrls.content: The scraper supports TripAdvisor restaurant search URLs from various regional domains:
list: Supported TLDs: .com, .fr, .co.uk, .de, .es, .it, and other regional domains
Filtered searches with cuisine type, price range, or features

proTips.content: Apply filters on TripAdvisor (cuisine type, price range, ratings) before copying the URL to get more targeted restaurant results.
TripAdvisor uses location IDs (g-codes) in URLs. Each city or region has a unique g-code that you can find by searching on the website.

seo.title: Add Tasks - TripAdvisor Restaurants Scraper - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to add TripAdvisor restaurant search URLs as tasks for scraping restaurant listings with ratings, reviews, and contact details.
